docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELIGMAN, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAZIO, JOE $903.33 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $943.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT FAZIO, JOE CASE SETTLED. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
